v: [24:16] And the damsel was very fair to look upon, a virgin, neither had any man known her: and she went down to the well, and filled her pitcher, and came up. [24:18] And she said, Drink, my lord: and she hasted, and let down her pitcher upon her hand, and gave him drink. ⭐[24:19] And when she had done giving him drink, she said, I will draw water for thy camels also, until they have done drinking. [24:21] And the man wondering at her held his peace, to wit whether the LORD had made his journey prosperous or not.
